description: The LocomotionAnimationFeetMetrics component is used to adjust the settings for an avatar's feet.

fields.Space: What transform space the metric values are in for this component.
fields.FeetSeparation: How far apart the feet should be placed from each other.
fields.FeetBackwardsOffset: How much the foot should be shifted forwards or backwards.
fields.FootHeight: The distance from the floor to the foot bone for the whole foot.
fields.FootFrontOffset: An optional value to influence the foot front distance from floor value.
fields.FootBackOffset: An optional value to influence the foot back distance from floor value.
